narrative: Pre-shift exam attempted by section foreman (not certified examiner) at 0630 for 0700 shift. Methane test at face C-3 returned 1.4% — withdraw non-essential personnel triggered but not executed; miners proceeded to face. Oxygen 19.2% at headgate dump — below 19.5% threshold. Ventilation quantity not measured at key points; smoke tube unavailable. Roof at xcut 12 showing loose draw rock not bolted; rib at C-3 sloughing; uncorrected hazard NOT dangered off. Record not entered in approved book before miners entered affected area. No communication to oncoming shift.
